entities.name: SUNFLOWER
entities.description: Edible oil crop known for short duration, high seed multiplication ratio, wider adaptability, photo-insensitivity, higher water use efficiency, and drought tolerance

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: An important edible oil crop used for comparison with sunflower

entities.name: SHORT DURATION
entities.description: Growth period of 90-100 days in sunflower

entities.name: HIGH SEED MULTIPLICATION RATIO
entities.description: Characteristic of sunflower seeds

entities.name: WIDER ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: Ability of sunflower to grow in various environments

entities.name: PHOTO-INSENSITIVE
entities.description: Lack of response to day length for flowering in sunflower

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: Ability of sunflower to produce biomass per unit of water used

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: Ability of sunflower to withstand water scarcity
